message:
test(proptest): add 51 serde roundtrip tests for robot_ntm_surface types

Covers all 57 Serialize+Deserialize types across 5 NTM command families
(Checkpoint, Context, Work, Fleet, Profile) plus NtmEquivalence,
ConvergenceClassification, NtmApiSurface, and RobotNtmCommand.
Includes 4 deterministic invariant checks and f64 tolerance handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
